answeredQuestions.high-level-requirements: Employees upload resumes. AI extracts skills. AI matches against project requirements. Recruiter reviews recommendations.
answeredQuestions.v1-user-groups: Internal employees only for resume upload
answeredQuestions.v1-resume-document-standard: Use token-efficient UTF-8 TXT format for resumes in v1
answeredQuestions.v1-project-requirements-source: In v1, project requirements are uploaded as documents; later phases will integrate with the source system
answeredQuestions.kpi-confirmation: User agreed with proposed KPI baselines and targets
answeredQuestions.v1-project-document-standard: Use token-efficient format to minimize processing cost; v1 uses UTF-8 TXT for project requirement documents
